description: A class to interact with a dongle entry for a single dongle connected to the system.

members.name: licenseType
members.description: Returns the license type for this product entry on the dongle.

members.name: updateDate
members.description: The date the product entry is valid until. Returns a tuple in the form (YYYY, MM, DD).

members.name: version
members.description: The version of TouchDesigner this dongle product entry is valid for.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ProductEntry Class wiki page
